mapper.select: SELECT id_bigint AS idBigint, students_id AS studentsId, course_name AS courseName, start, endplan FROM students_courses WHERE students_ID = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students_courses (students_ID, course_name, start, endplan) VALUES(#{studentsId}, #{courseName}, #{start}, #{endplan})
mapper.update: UPDATE students_courses SET course_name = #{courseName} WHERE id_bigint = #{idBigint}
